sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْمُوسِيقَى الْعَرَبِيَّةُ مِرْآةً حَقِيقِيَّةً لِلْوِجْدَانِ الشَّعْبِيِّ وَالْأَصَالَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika se smatra istinskim ogledalom narodne duše i autentičnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic music is considered a true mirror of the popular soul and authenticity.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَعْبِيرٌ عَمِيقٌ عَنِ الْعَوَاطِفِ الْإِنْسَانِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَجْتَاحُ الْقُلُوبَ.
sentences.translation: Ona je dubok izraz ljudskih emocija koje preplavljuju srca.
sentences.translationEn: It is a deep expression of the human emotions that sweep through hearts.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ هَذِهِ الْمُوسِيقَى عَلَى نِظَامِ "الْمَقَامَاتِ" الَّذِي يُمَيِّزُهَا عَالَمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Ova muzika se oslanja na sistem 'maqamata' koji je razlikuje u cijelom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: This music relies on the 'Maqamat' system, which distinguishes it globally.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ تَعَمَّقْنَا فِي دِرَاسَةِ هَذِهِ الْمَقَامَاتِ، لَادْرَكْنَا سِرَّ تَنَوُّعِهَا النَّغَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ako bismo se produbili u proučavanje ovih maqamata, shvatili bismo tajnu njihove melodične raznolikosti.
sentences.translationEn: If we were to delve into the study of these Maqamat, we would realize the secret of their melodic diversity.

sentences.arabic: لِكُلِّ مَقَامٍ شَخْصِيَّةٌ نَفْسِيَّةٌ تُؤَثِّرُ فِي مَشَاعِرِ الْمُسْتَمِعِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki maqam ima psihološki karakter koji precizno utiče na osjećanja slušaoca.
sentences.translationEn: Each Maqam has a psychological personality that precisely affects the listener's feelings.

sentences.arabic: فَبَعْضُهَا يَبُثُّ الْفَرَحَ، وَبَعْضُهَا الْآخَرُ يُثِيرُ الشَّجَنَ وَالْحَنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Neki od njih šire radost, dok drugi izazivaju tugu i čežnju.
sentences.translationEn: Some spread joy, while others evoke sorrow and longing.

sentences.arabic: قَدْ سَاهَمَ كِبَارُ الْمُوسِيقِيِّينَ فِي تَطْوِيرِ آلَةِ الْعُودِ الشَّهِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Veliki muzičari su doprinijeli razvoju čuvenog instrumenta uda.
sentences.translationEn: Great musicians have contributed to the development of the famous Oud instrument.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ هَذِهِ الْآلَةُ سُلْطَانَةَ الْأَلْحَانِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ وَرَمْزَ الْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj instrument se smatra kraljicom arapskih melodija i simbolom kreativnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This instrument is considered the sovereign of Arabic melodies and a symbol of creativity.

sentences.arabic: لَا يُمْكِنُ الْحَدِيثُ عَنِ الْفَنِّ دُونَ ذِكْرِ مَفْهُومِ "الطَّرَبِ" الْأَصِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Nemoguće je govoriti o umjetnosti bez spominjanja autentičnog koncepta 'taraba'.
sentences.translationEn: It is impossible to speak of art without mentioning the authentic concept of 'Tarab'.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ تِلْكَ الْحَالَةُ مِنَ الِانْتِشَاءِ الرُّوحِيِّ النَّاتِجَةِ عَنْ أَدَاءٍ مُتْقَنٍ.
sentences.translation: To je ono stanje duhovnog zanosa koje proizlazi iz usavršene izvedbe.
sentences.translationEn: It is that state of spiritual ecstasy resulting from a masterful performance.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْحِفَاظَ عَلَى هَذَا التُّرَاثِ يَتَطَلَّبُ جُهُودًا حَثِيثَةً لِتَعْلِيمِ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje ove baštine zahtijeva neumorne napore u podučavanju mladih.
sentences.translationEn: Preserving this heritage requires tireless efforts to educate the youth.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ تَلْقِينُهُمْ أُصُولَ الْغِنَاءِ لِكَيْ لَا تَضِيعَ هَذِهِ الْكُنُوزُ الْفَنِّيَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Moraju se podučavati osnovama pjevanja kako se ovo umjetničko blago ne bi izgubilo.
sentences.translationEn: They must be taught the principles of singing so that these artistic treasures are not lost.

sentences.arabic: تَظَلُّ الْمُوسِيقَى جِسْرًا يَرْبِطُ بَيْنَ الْمَاضِي الْعَرِيقِ وَالْحَاضِرِ.
sentences.translation: Muzika ostaje most koji povezuje drevnu prošlost i sadašnjost.
sentences.translationEn: Music remains a bridge connecting the ancient past and the present.

sentences.arabic: فَهِيَ لُغَةٌ عَالَمِيَّةٌ تَحْمِلُ فِي طَيَّاتِهَا هُوِيَّةَ أُمَّةٍ بِأَكْمَلِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ona je univerzalan jezik koji u sebi nosi identitet čitave nacije.
sentences.translationEn: It is a universal language that carries within it the identity of an entire nation.
